data.title: Invitation to Skanska's Capital Markets Day on Nov 18, 2025 in Seattle, USA. Venue: The Eight, 10770 NE 8th St, Bellevue.
data.description: Join us in Seattle, Washington state, USA on November 18, 2025, for our Capital Markets Day. This event is open to investors, analysts, and financial media and will take place at The Eight located at 10770 NE 8th St, Bellevue, Washington state, USA. Registration and breakfast will be provided for attendees.

data.title: Raytron introduces high-sensitivity infrared thermal camera for real-time gas leak detection; improves efficiency and safety for LDAR inspectors.
data.description: YANTAI, China - The city witnessed a groundbreaking development on August 25, 2025, as Raytron introduced a novel approach to revolutionize the process of detecting gas leaks for LDAR inspectors. In the realm of leak detection and repair, the conventional methods have been characterized by sluggishness, risk, and inconclusiveness, particularly in sprawling industrial complexes. Raytron, known for its expertise in infrared thermal imaging, is spearheading a new era in gas leak detection. This innovation is projected to significantly enhance the efficiency and accuracy of detecting gas leaks in industrial settings.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper to acquire JDE Peet's, split into two companies: coffee leader in 100+ countries & North American refreshment beverage giant.
data.description: The purchase agreement will result in the formation of a dominant player in the global coffee industry, with a presence in over 100 countries. This new entity will boast an extensive brand portfolio spanning all segments, distribution channels, and pricing tiers within the coffee market. Following the acquisition, there are plans for a division process that will establish a rapidly expanding North American beverage company. It is set to become the leading pure-play company in the sector, poised for significant growth and expansion.

data.title: ProVerum raises $80M in Series B to develop ProVee® System for BPH treatment, led by MVM.
data.description: Dublin-based ProVerum Limited revealed on August 25, 2025, the successful completion of an $80 million Series B equity financing round. The company specializes in the ProVee® System, designed to address benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) through a minimally invasive approach. This significant funding was spearheaded by MVM and marks a substantial milestone for advancing their innovative medical solution.

data.title: OneOdio and OpenRock to showcase audio products at IFA 2025 in Berlin from Sept 5-9. Exciting event in Hall 11.2, Booth 129.
data.description: Mark your calendars as the highly anticipated IFA 2025 event in Hong Kong is quickly approaching, set to take place from September 5 to 9. OneOdio and OpenRock are preparing to present an exceptional audio display at Hall 11.2, Booth 129 in Berlin, promising an exciting showcase for attendees. Be sure not to miss out on this opportunity to experience the latest innovations in audio technology firsthand.

data.title: Akeso's Phase 3 trials for Gumokimab for Ankylosing Spondylitis and Manfidokimab for Atopic Dermatitis meet primary endpoints.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Akeso Inc. (9926.HK) unveiled encouraging outcomes from the Phase 3 clinical study of gumokimab (AK111), a pioneering fully human anti-IL-17A monoclonal antibody, designed for treating active ankylosing spondylitis (AS)....

data.title: Trump's family embraced crypto after Biden 'weaponized' banks, as per reports. Eric Trump revealed their conglomerate was 'debanked' post-2021 Capitol attack.
data.description: Donald Trump's son, Eric Trump, revealed that their family's conglomerate was cut off from financial services after the Capitol attack in 2021.

data.title: Week 34 saw companies on various stock exchanges engaging in share buyback programs, overseen by regulators and stakeholders.
data.description: Various stock exchanges, including Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and the London Stock Exchange, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders, are part of an ongoing collaborative effort. The initiative involves a group of key players in the financial industry coming together to enhance transparency and accountability. This strategic partnership aims to foster better communication and ensure regulatory compliance within the sector. Key players involved include important regulatory bodies and stock exchanges in the region.

data.title: Metaplanet now in FTSE Japan Index, keeps stacking Bitcoin; Tokyo-listed firm added to FTSE Japan and All-World indices, buys more Bitcoin.
data.description: A Bitcoin treasury firm listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange has recently joined the FTSE Japan and All-World indices as part of its strategy of increasing Bitcoin purchases. The move reflects the growing acceptance and integration of Bitcoin in the traditional financial markets. This development underscores the company's commitment to expanding its Bitcoin holdings amid the rising popularity of cryptocurrencies among investors. The inclusion in these indices showcases the firm's growing influence and prominence in the market. This decision comes as the firm aims to capitalize on the increasing value and demand for Bitcoin, indicating a significant shift towards digital assets within the global financial landscape.

data.title: Trump family embraces crypto after Biden ‘weaponizes banks’ – Eric Trump reveals they were ‘debanked’ post-2021 Capitol attack.
data.description: Eric Trump, son of former US President Donald Trump, has revealed that their family conglomerate was cut off from banking services following the 2021 Capitol attack. This decision resulted in the company losing access to essential financial operations and accounts. The move signifies a significant blow to the Trump Organization’s financial stability and operations moving forward.
